name: Information Services Group Inc.
summary: Information Services Group, Inc. (ISG) is a global AI-centered technology research and advisory firm serving over 900 clients, including 75 of the world's top 100 enterprises. Founded in 2006, ISG provides digital transformation advisory, sourcing advisory, cloud and data analytics, managed governance, market intelligence, and proprietary platforms (ISG GovernX, ISG Inform, ISG Tango) to private and public sector clients across the Americas, Europe, and Asia-Pacific.

products.name: ISG GovernX
products.description: Proprietary digital platform enabling clients to improve supplier management.

products.name: ISG Inform
products.description: Proprietary digital platform for benchmarking operational performance.

products.name: ISG Tango
products.description: Proprietary digital platform to accelerate sourcing decisions.

products.description: Client solution area focused on technology, transformation, sourcing, and digital solutions.

products.description: Client solution area helping clients manage change and optimize IT, finance, HR, and training operations.

products.name: ISG Research
products.description: Provides market analyses, provider evaluations, and data-driven insights.

products.name: ISG Network and Software Advisory
products.description: Advisory portfolio covering network and software strategy.

products.name: Solution Hub
products.description: Integrates ISG's global knowledge base, tools, and intellectual property for tailored client solutions.

products.name: ISG iFlex
products.description: Global delivery model enabling efficient worldwide resource deployment and scalable execution.
